form.formComment: Gelding returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last campaign second of 10 at Fairview All Weather December 22 over 1200m, a 0.3 lengths behind Fairy Knight with 62kg at $7. Previously first up; third in a small field at this track October 31 over 1000m, a long neck behind Kingdundee with 62kg at $5. Top strike-rate this course and distance. Four time winner fresh and will go close.
